allow:
Bash(cd /home/abdul/claudeProjects/CYB236/course/Labs && \\
  mv lab3/ lab3_temp/ && \\
  mv lab4/ lab3/ && mv lab3/lab04-english.html lab3/lab03-english.html && \\
  mv lab5/ lab4/ && mv lab4/lab05-english.html lab4/lab04-english.html && \\
  mv lab3_temp/ lab5/ && mv lab5/lab03-english.html lab5/lab05-english.html)

Bash(for w in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do 
  echo "=== week$w ==="
  grep -i "title\\|h1\\|chapter" /home/abdul/claudeProjects/CYB236/course/week$w/index.html 2>/dev/null | grep -v "style\\|class\\|meta\\|svg" | head -5
done)
Bash(git -C /home/abdul/claudeProjects/CYB236/course show HEAD:Labs/lab5/lab05-english.html 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "No git history")
